post.description: Update the user's Firebase Cloud Messaging token for push notifications.
Verifies the refreshed Firebase ID token after client-side provider linking. Syncs the newly linked identity onto the app user record and returns the final session state.
Checks whether the authenticated user may link a new provider (google, email, phone). Returns a machine-readable decision and the recommended next step before the client performs Firebase linking.
Invalidate the session and add token to denylist.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile. Creates the user record on first sign-in (upsert).

Returns all property-scoped roles for the authenticated user (owner/manager/viewer on properties, tenant on active stays). Used to build the context switcher on first app load. Re-fetch when roles change.

patch.description: Stores the preferred property context used by the client as the default landing context. Send an empty propertyId to clear it.

get.description: Returns the tenant's active stay details.

post.description: Sets name, gender, and optional profile fields. Role is optional — omitting it leaves the role pending. Returns the updated user, roleStatus (pending|assigned), and profileCompleted flag.
Verifies a Firebase ID token and returns a machine-readable decision (allow_session, require_onboarding, conflict, etc.) plus any existing account matches. No app-level auth required.

get.description: Get a paginated list of user notifications.

patch.description: Marks all notifications for the current user as read.
Marks a specific notification as read and returns the updated resource.

get.description: Returns all organizations the authenticated user is a member of (as billing owner or regular member).

post.description: Creates a new org with the caller as billing owner. One org per user.

get.description: Returns the org where the caller is the billing owner.
Returns the org details. Caller must be a member of the org.

patch.description: Renames an org. Only the billing owner may do this.

post.description: Uploads a base64-encoded logo image (jpeg/png/webp, max 5 MB) to GCS and updates the org's logoUrl. Caller must be the billing owner.

get.description: Returns all users who are members of the org. Caller must be a member.

post.description: Adds a user to the org. Caller must be the billing owner.
post.summary: Add a member to an org

delete.description: Removes a user from the org. Caller must be the billing owner.
delete.summary: Remove a member from an org

post.description: Assigns the same property role across multiple properties in the org.
post.summary: Bulk assign an org member to properties

get.description: Returns all properties belonging to the org. Caller must be an org member.

patch.description: Transfers the org billing owner and subscription ownership to another existing org member.

get.description: Get a paginated list of payments for the current user. Owners see all payments for their properties, tenants see their own.

post.description: Initiate a new payment. Usually called by tenants for rent or deposit.

parameters.description: Idempotency key to prevent duplicate charges
parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key

get.description: Get a paginated list of rent-only payments. Shortcut for owners.
Returns financial summaries (total collected, pending, etc.) for the dashboard.
Returns a single payment. Owners see any payment on their properties; tenants see their own.

post.description: Creates provider checkout metadata for a pending payment.
Owner confirms receipt of a cash, bank-transfer, or external-UPI payment. Transitions payment pending|overdue → paid and creates a payout record. Not for online gateway payments.
Called by tenant after the payment gateway returns success. Verifies provider proof before marking payment as paid. Falls back to manual paymentMethod/transactionRef confirmation during migration.

get.description: Get a paginated list of bank settlements for an owner.
Returns all available subscription plans and identifies which one the owner is currently on.
Get a paginated list of properties

post.description: Create a new property (Owner only)

get.description: Get details of a single property by its ID.

put.description: Update property details by ID (Owner only).

delete.description: Soft delete a property by ID (Owner only).

post.description: Uploads a base64-encoded image (jpeg/png/webp, max 10 MB) to GCS. The first image uploaded automatically becomes the cover.

delete.description: Removes a property image. If the deleted image was the cover, the next image becomes the cover automatically.

get.description: Get all members and their roles for a property.

post.description: Assign a role to a user for this property.

delete.description: Remove a user's role assignment from this property.

get.description: Returns whether the property is private to explicitly assigned users.

patch.description: Marks a property as private or org-visible.

get.description: Get all rooms for a property

post.description: Add a new room to a property (requires property:update permission)
post.summary: Create a room in a property

get.description: Get all active tenants for a property (owner/manager only)

post.description: Create an invite code for a tenant (requires property:update permission)
post.summary: Invite a tenant to a property

get.description: Returns a paginated list of non-private properties accessible without authentication. Suitable for SEO and property discovery. Supports filtering by location.

parameters.description: Filter by city or area name
parameters.name: location

get.description: Returns details of a single non-private property. No authentication required.
Returns a paginated list of non-private properties matching advanced filters (keyword, location, price, type). No authentication required.
Returns aggregated payment stats and list of payments for a property in a given month

parameters.description: Month in YYYY-MM format (defaults to current month)
parameters.name: month

get.description: Get details of a single room

delete.description: Remove a room from a property (requires property:delete permission)

patch.description: Patch room fields (requires property:update permission on parent property)

post.description: Create or replace the owner's active subscription

get.description: Get the owner's active subscription plan (returns 204 if none)

patch.description: Change the plan of an active subscription

post.description: Redeem an invite code to become a tenant at a property
post.summary: Join a property using an invite code

patch.description: Update rent amount, room, or lease end date for a tenant stay

post.description: Links a new authentication provider (google, phone) to the account.
Sets the user's profile on first-time onboarding. name and gender are required.
Uploads a base64-encoded profile image (jpeg/png/webp, max 5 MB) to GCS and updates the user's avatarUrl.

get.description: Get API liveness status

imageUrl.description: cover image URL (denormalized for fast list queries)

images.description: all images; populated only on GetProperty, empty slice on list

occupiedRooms.description: derived server-side, never accepted from client

idempotencyKey.description: from X-Idempotency-Key header, not request body
